n: This is Not the Work of a Cook

steps.t: The dreadful goblin-cook is constantly at work in his kitchens in the caves of western Nan Curunir. Ondor suggests that if you can slip the goblin-coo…
Ondor is encamped near the caves of western Nan Curunir. You should let Ondor know that the goblin-cook has cooked his last stew.
